commit.author: drdave-flexnteos <flexnetos@de-flex.net>

lines.content: ## Fix path (acceptance)
- [ ] Make the validator actually runnable in the shipped toolchain: either add
pytest to foundation-tools or convert `test_preserve_artifacts.py` to
unittest style like its four sibling gates (preferred — zero new deps).
- [ ] Re-baseline `preserve_provenance_baselines.csv` from the main checkout:
drop the seven cleaned-up worktree peer rows (record their final HEADs in
the reconciliation note), add rows for `envctl-wt-archbp042` and `atc`,
refresh stale `head_commit` values.
- [ ] Run all four validator functions green; append the evidence to
PRESERVE-002/003 proof records (revision bump, append-only ledger).
- [ ] Add the gate to the per-flip pipeline so it can never silently no-op
again (a runner `__main__` block that fails loudly).
- [x] Make the validator actually runnable — converted to unittest style with
a loud `__main__` runner (zero new deps); SPINE now resolves relative to
the file so each checkout validates its own artifacts.
- [x] Re-baseline `preserve_provenance_baselines.csv` — done in the
archbp-frontier worktree (flows to main via PR #98): 7 stale rows dropped
with final HEADs preserved in the topology reconciliation note, `atc` +
`envctl-wt-archbp042` added, all surviving HEAD/branch/state refreshed;
37 rows == 37 live peers.
- [x] All four validator tests execute and pass; PRESERVE-002 bumped to rev 2
and PRESERVE-003 to rev 3 with the re-baseline evidence (ledger seq
376/377, append-only).
- [x] Gate added to the per-flip pipeline (now 5 python gates); the unittest
runner exits loudly on failure and can never silently no-op.
## Evidence

changes.title: PRESERVE provenance CSV drifted; its validator was silently inert (no pytest)

commit.message: preserve-provenance incident resolved: validator runnable, CSV re-baselined, proofs bumped
